# AIR Korean Ad Insights

> Aggregated Korean digital advertising market data — coverage of NAVER SA, Kakao Moment, Google Ads, Meta, Criteo, TikTok KR. Updated daily. License: CC-BY 4.0. Operated by Bizspring.

## Pages

- [개요 / Overview](https://air.bmp.ai/): 30-day media spend, share, advertiser counts.
- [매체 점유율 / Market Share](https://air.bmp.ai/market-share): Light projection sorted by share desc.
- [시즌 추이 / Seasonal Pattern](https://air.bmp.ai/seasonal): Time series (30d/90d/180d, day/week granularity).
- [광고주 수 / Advertiser Count](https://air.bmp.ai/advertisers): Distinct active advertisers per media (30d cardinality).
- [소개 / About](https://air.bmp.ai/about): Service overview + citation guide.

## Suggested Citation

- KO: 비즈스프링 AIR (2026). 한국 디지털 광고 시장 통합 데이터. https://air.bmp.ai
- EN: Bizspring AIR (2026). Korean Digital Ad Market Aggregated Data. https://air.bmp.ai

## License

CC-BY 4.0 — Free to cite and reuse with attribution.

## MCP API (Tier 1, anonymous)

- get_korean_ad_market_overview
- get_media_market_share
- get_seasonal_ad_spending_pattern
- get_advertiser_count_by_media
